title: Assam HS Result 2026 (OUT) LIVE: AHSEC Class 12th results declared at ahsec.assam.gov.in, direct link to check here
description: Assam HS Result 2026 OUT LIVE: AHSEC Class 12th results announced on April 28, 2026. The direct link to check results is available at ahsec.assam.gov.in. Follow the blog for latest updates on results, direct link, toppers and more.
